steps_completed.task: Create test file with module-level mocks for useSession and useEventTrade, fixtures, and defaultMutationState helper
Guard clause tests: renders nothing for inactive market and unconfigured session
Rendering test: Quick Trade heading, Buy/Sell toggles, outcome selector with marginal probabilities, trade button
Interaction tests: buy/sell toggle and outcome selection with Price label
Submission test: correct payload with accountId, formula, side, idempotencyKey, session
Sell side submission test: toggle to sell, verify payload.side is sell
Pending state test: button shows Submitting... and is disabled
Success state test: Trade accepted message with orderId and TradeReceipt values
TradeReceipt color threshold tests: danger (>0.5), warning (>0.2), muted (<=0.2)
Error state tests: Error instance message and non-Error fallback
No-submission guard test: mutate not called when no outcome selected
